testedAssertions.reason: MetricStrip shared-component surface was not reachable on real UI. /dashboard/night is not found and /dashboard did not render MetricStrip expand/collapse charts.

evidence.observedUiBehavior: Observed either empty onboarding state ('Connect a data source to get started') or generic dashboard shell without MetricStrip rows.
evidence.network: GET /api/auth/session observed; no MetricStrip-related view API calls captured in this flow.

testedAssertions.reason: InsightCard did not render on reachable dashboard pages, so dismiss action and conditional no-render state for shared InsightCard could not be exercised on real user surface.

evidence.observedUiBehavior: No 💡 insight narrative card or dismiss button present.

testedAssertions.reason: DateNavigation component contract (calendar picker + forward/back arrows + Night/Recovery/Trend toggle) was not available on reachable UI surface.

evidence.observedUiBehavior: Only date-range button and Daily/Weekly/Monthly tabs were visible; no arrow controls and no Night/Recovery/Trend view toggle on tested routes.

testedAssertions.reason: Could observe empty and loading-like states, but full shared-component state contract (including retryable in-app error path) could not be validated due missing target shared-component surface.

evidence.observedUiBehavior: Empty state message present; loading-like placeholders appeared in alternate dashboard state; offline reload produced browser-level disconnect/blank capture rather than in-app retry card.
evidence.network: Offline reload returned net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED; no in-app API error card with retry was reachable.

testedAssertions.reason: Accessibility checks specific to shared components (chart aria labels, DeltaBadge SR text, InsightCard dismiss keyboard activation) could not be executed because those elements were not present on tested UI.

evidence.observedUiBehavior: Keyboard focus indicator confirmed for sidebar navigation item, but required shared-component interactive targets were absent.

testedAssertions.reason: Responsive behavior for shared strips/annotation markers could not be validated because those components were not rendered; only empty dashboard layout was available across breakpoints.

evidence.observedUiBehavior: Layout adapts to desktop/tablet/mobile for empty state, but assertion-required strip/time-axis/annotation rendering was unavailable.

frictions.description: Dashboard surface was inconsistent across reloads (alternated between onboarding empty-state and a generic toolbar + empty chart shell), reducing deterministic reproduction for component assertions.
frictions.resolution: Retried navigation and reloaded /dashboard and query-string variants; behavior remained inconsistent.

frictions.description: Date button interaction timed out in one run because the previously visible element became non-interactable during state transition.
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted and captured evidence of current surface state instead of proceeding with invalid element refs.

frictions.description: Offline simulation triggered browser-level net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED on reload, yielding a blank capture instead of an in-app retry card.
frictions.resolution: Restored online mode and continued with remaining assertions.

blockers.description: Required shared-component test surface for Night/Recovery/Trend UI was unavailable on local routes. /dashboard/night, /dashboard/recovery, and /dashboard/trend resolved to not-found pages.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated auth by setting __session for seeded user_test_001, retried /dashboard and view query-string variants, and captured route-level evidence.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions on the real browser surface; all 6 are blocked because the shared-component validation surface was not reachable on available dashboard routes.
